task_updates.executor_notes: Added the admin_payment_intents batch and lookup helpers in DatabaseHandler without touching get_active_intent_for_recipient, list_active_intents, or has_active_payment_or_intent. The batch insert uses a single Supabase insert call, the stale-awaiting-admin-init helper filters by both status and updated_at cutoff, and the new payment-to-intent lookup helpers cover both test and final payment ids; verified with py_compile and focused payment pytest modules.

Rewrote AdminChatCog.on_message into the identity-based three-way router: admin messages always go through extracted _handle_admin_message, pending recipients route through new _handle_pending_recipient_message, and all other authors fall through. The on_message path no longer calls _check_pending_payment_reply or uses _is_directed_at_bot / _can_user_message_bot gating for the admin path, and the dead-code status is documented inline; verified with py_compile and focused payment pytest modules.

Added AdminApprovalView, PaymentUICog._send_admin_approval_dm, and restart-time admin approval view registration. The admin approval button uses the distinct payment_admin_approve custom_id, authorizes only ADMIN_USER_ID via PaymentActorKind.ADMIN_DM, edits the DM to '✅ approved — queued for sending', posts a queued-for-sending update into the intent thread, and deletes both prompt_message_id and receipt_prompt_message_id via safe_delete_messages; DM failures log at ERROR and return None. Verified with py_compile and focused payment pytest modules.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed create_admin_payment_intents_batch performs a single Supabase insert([...]) request for the whole batch, and list_stale_awaiting_admin_init_intents filters on both status='awaiting_admin_init' and updated_at < cutoff.

Confirmed on_message is now the strict admin / pending-recipient / fallthrough switch, with no _is_directed_at_bot or _can_user_message_bot gate on the admin path, and the direct _check_pending_payment_reply call was removed from on_message.

Confirmed AdminApprovalView uses timeout=None with custom_id payment_admin_approve:{payment_id}, edits the DM to queued-for-sending state, posts a queued-for-sending thread update, deletes both prompt ids via safe_delete_messages, and _send_admin_approval_dm fails closed on Forbidden/HTTPException by logging ERROR and returning None.
